title: Language and framework constraints met
evidence: Go with net/http standard library and modernc.org/sqlite

title: SQLite data storage implemented
evidence: book.go:40-56, migrate() creates schema with autoincrement IDs

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: server.go:145-155, all handlers use writeJSON/writeError with correct status codes

title: Input validation for required fields
evidence: book.go:23-31, validate() enforces title and author required

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md exists with comprehensive setup, API docs, and examples

title: Unit/integration tests
evidence: server_test.go has 7 passing tests, exceeding minimum of 3

title: Comprehensive test coverage
evidence: 7 tests cover all CRUD operations, validation, filtering, and error cases

title: Clean architecture with separation of concerns
evidence: main.go (startup), server.go (HTTP handlers), book.go (data model and storage), server_test.go (integration tests)
